arts.ttl: It's time for Arne Slot to show he belongs at Europe's top table, writes LEWIS STEELE... ahead of Liverpool's Champions League trip to AC Milan
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE IN MILAN: Playing AC Milan these days might not be the heavyweight match-up it was but it is still a meeting of two of the leading protagonists of this competition's history.

arts.ttl: Alisson wants player input into fixture heavy calendar
arts.sum: "We are not stupid, we understand that people want more games, but the reasonable thing would be for all the people I mentioned – those who make the calendar – to sit together and listen to all the parts inclusive of the players. "Nobody asks the players what they think about adding more games so maybe our opinion does not matter.

arts.ttl: ‘I love Italy’ – Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson on Milan, Maignan, Chiesa and UCL plan
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper and former Roma stopper Alisson Becker has spoken of his love for Italy...

arts.ttl: Arsenal battle Liverpool for Salah teammate: Bundesliga hotshot 'keen'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are interested in Omar Marmoush and the player is keen on a Premier League switch, according to a report. Already in the summer, Marmoush was being courted by Premier League outfits after finding the net 17 times last season.

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa named in Liverpool squad ahead of potential debut
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Federico Chiesa is in with a chance of making his debut for the club in this week's Champions League opener against AC Milan at San Siro. A start is unlikely given a lack of recent action, as well as the competition for attacking places in Slot's lineup, but fans will certainly be keen to see Liverpool's only summer signing get onto the pitch.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends clear 'respect' message to Liverpool players ahead of AC Milan test
arts.sum: Liverpool open their Champions League campaign at the San Siro against AC Milan on Tuesday night and will be aiming to bounce back from their shock defeat against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Team News: AC Milan vs. Liverpool injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between AC Milan and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: I was at Arne Slot press conference and he gave perfect Liverpool answer to difficult Italian question
arts.sum: Arne Slot was asked whether his Liverpool team would be "scared" of facing AC Milan

arts.ttl: Champions League: Slot provides Liverpool assessment ahead of Milan trip
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admitted that he has ‘a lot of respect’ for Milan, but...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's pre-AC Milan press conference: 'It's a big game - one to look forward to' - Liverpool FC
arts.sum: It's difficult to say before you start, but I think it's clear if you want to end up in the first eight you have to win a lot of games and you need a lot of points. For me, it had a lot to do with the playing style of the opponent, who made it really difficult for us, but in the end if you don't win then you try to look at as many arguments as you can find - and I also asked myself the question, 'OK, does it have to do with the things you said?' But I prefer to look at the game back and see what we did well, what we didn’t do well and I think we could have done a lot of things much better that was not related to rotation.
